name: 12p11_pericentromeric_SD
description: 12p11.21-p11.1 pericentromeric segmental duplication pile-up immediately p-arm of the chr12 centromere. Hosts the TBX5/TBX3 paralog cores and recurrent SDs shared with other pericentromeres.

architecture.internal_structure: Pericentromeric SD modules of 10-150 kb at 94-98% identity; shared duplicons with chr2p, chr10q, chr16p pericentromeric blocks; assembly-uncertain.
